rulings.Case Title: ACACIA BANK VS. DIAMOND BRIDGE PARTNERS,LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Osc Why The Dwelling Shall Not Be Sold;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2017, line 1. Hearing On Osc Why The Dwelling Shall Not Be Sold; GRANTED. Response to OSC has not been filed in accordance with the Court's order - papers submitted for e-filing at 8:30 a.m. on February 23, 2017; no courtesy copies provided in violation of SFLR 2.7B and Court order; proof of service indicates that response papers executed on February 22, 2017 were caused to be served on January 19, 2017. Therefore, the OSC remains unopposed as is GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Request To Dismiss Nrt West, Inc'S Second Amended Cross-Complaint For Implied Equitable Indemnity
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM CAMPBELL, MARJORIE CAMPBELL's Amended Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement And Request To Dismiss Nrt West, Inc'S Second Amended Cross-Complaint For Implied Equitable Indemnity DENIED. Moving party fails to meet Tech-Built factors. Specifically, moving party failed to show that the settlement (as it is structures) is in the ball park of moving party's joint liability taking into consideration allocation under Dilingham and the settling tortfeasor's potential liability for indemnity under Far West. Dilingham Const. v. Nadel partnership (1998) 64 Cal.App.4th 264, Far West Financial Corp. v. D&S Company, Inc. (1988) 46 Cal.3d 796. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Nrt West, Inc. To Produce Guidelines For Multiple Offer Presentations Or, In The Alternative, For An In Limine Order Barring Introduction Of Certain Evidence At Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT MARJORIE CAMPBELL's Motion To Compel Nrt West, Inc. To Produce Guidelines For Multiple Offer Presentations Or, In The Alternative, For An In Limine Order Barring Introduction Of Certain Evidence At Trial OFF CALENDAR per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAZIM Z ACAR VS. JENNIFER E CRANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant And Cross-Complainant Jennifer E. Cranes Motion For Security Undertaking And Compel Plaintiff Kazim Acars Physical Address
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 28, 2017, line 8. Defendant And Cross-Complainant Jennifer E. Cranes' Motion For Security Undertaking And Compel Plaintiff Kazim Acars Physical Address GRANTED as follows: Plaintiff must post an undertaking in the amount of $2,125.50 (includes filing fees and attorneys fees per paragraph 25 of the Rental Agreement) to secure an award of costs and attorney's fees on this complaint. Undertaking must be posted no later than March 17, 2017. Plaintiff to fill out and file form MC-040 by March 17, 2017 per CRC 2.200 providing Plaintiff's new mailing address. = (501/REQ)
